title: RBI Mandates Disclosure of DICGC Premium Payment Due to Risk-Based Premium Framework
description:
The RBI directed rural co-operative banks to disclose timely payment or arrears of DICGC insurance premiums in their annual reports. The amendment strengthens transparency in financial reporting.
The post RBI Mandates Disclosure of DICGC Premium Payment Due to Risk-Based Premium Framework appeared first on TaxGuru.
